</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Avibactam 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Emblaveo is indicated for the treatment of the following infections in adult patients (see sections 4.4 and 5.1):• Complicated intra-abdominal infection (cIAI)• Hospital-acquired pneumonia (HAP),...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L1</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>pyelonephritis（100.0%）</li>
<li>streptococcal pneumonia（99.7%）</li>
<li>influenza, severe, susceptibility to（99.3%）</li>
<li>ureter tuberculosis（99.1%）</li>
<li>urinary schistosomiasis（99.1%）</li>
<li>polyclonal hyperviscosity syndrome（99.0%）</li>
<li>hyperamylasemia（99.0%）</li>
<li>staphylococcus aureus infection（99.0%）</li>
<li>renal tuberculosis（98.9%）</li>
<li>squamous cell lung carcinoma（98.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/avibactam/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
